overview.text: The NSW Telco Authority builds, maintains and operates the State's Public Safety Network (PSN) — the digital trunked radio network that consolidates the previous Government Radio Network (GRN) and serves the police, fire, ambulance, SES, health, transport, utilities and many councils.

items: TGA owns the network — its own talkgroups are typically site-test, engineering and field-maintenance traffic.
Migration of NSW agencies onto the PSN consolidates emergency communications statewide.
